topic: Analyze holder flow and smart-money signals on Mantle token 0x5d3a1Ff2b6BAb83b63cd9AD0787074081a52ef34

sources.title: Token whale transfers

orchestrationSteps.summary: Detected a Mantle token address and selected holder-flow / smart-money tools.
Collected Mantle transfer evidence and local synthesis outputs.
Recorded the decision hash and evidence URI to LangclawRegistry on Mantle.

finalAnswer.title: Mantle smart-money watch
finalAnswer.signal: smart-money or holder-flow activity needs monitoring
finalAnswer.recommendation: Add the strongest source-backed signal to the Mantle Alpha watchlist and record the decision proof.
finalAnswer.caveat: This is analysis-only. Langclaw did not sign, send, swap, buy, sell, or execute any transaction.
